zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel於1296年出生在德國時，她的父親Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg16歲，母親Anna Herzogin von Österreich16歲。她於1310年1月5日與Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年3月31日在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉波維亞特 格奧洛福斯吉享年33歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛盧包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel于1296年出生在德国时，她的父亲Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg16岁，母亲Anna Herzogin von Österreich16岁。她于1310年1月5日与Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1329年3月31日在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉波維亞特 格奧洛福斯吉享年33岁，埋葬在德国尼德薩辛盧包格。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel was born in 1296, in Germany, her father, Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg, was 16 and her mother, Anna Herzogin von Österreich, was 16. She married Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II on 5 January 1310. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 31 March 1329, in Góra County, Lower Silesia, Poland, at the age of 33, and was buried in Lüneburg, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel est née en 1296, à Allemagne, son père, Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Anna Herzogin von Österreich, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II le 5 janvier 1310. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 mars 1329, à Powiat górowski, dolnośląskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

de.Zielona Góra, Lodzkie, Poland: Zielona Góra, Koluszki, Łódzki wschodni, łódzkie, Polen
de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel 1296 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg 16 und ihre Mutter Anna Herzogin von Österreich 16. Sie hat am 5. Januar 1310 Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. März 1329 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Powiat górowski, Niederschlesien, Polen und wurde in Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel è nata il nel 1296 nel Germania, sua padre, Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Anna Herzogin von Österreich, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II il 5 gennaio 1310. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 31 marzo 1329, nel Powiat górowski, dolnośląskie, Polonia, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedelが1296年にドイツで生まれた時，父Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburgは16歳，母Anna Herzogin von Österreichは16歳であった。1310年1月5日にHeinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1329年3月31日にポーランドドルノsルaスキポウィアト グoロウスキで33歳で死去し，ドイツニーダーサチセンルuネブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel(이)가 1296년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Herzogin von Österreich(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1310년 1월 5일 Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 3월 31일 폴란드 도노sa스키 파위앳 그o로우스키에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 u니버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel nasceu em 1296, em Alemanha, seu pai, Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Anna Herzogin von Österreich, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II em 5 de janeiro de 1310. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de março de 1329, em Powiat górowski, dolnośląskie, Polônia, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel родилась в 1296 г. в местности Германия, её отцу по имени Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Herzogin von Österreich, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II 5 января 1310 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 31 марта 1329 г. в местности поуят гoроуски, долноsлaски, Польша в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности лuнебург, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde De Brandebourg-Salzwedel nació en 1296, en Alemania, su papá, Hermann II. Markgraf von Brandenburg, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Anna Herzogin von Österreich, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Heinrich Von Schlesien-Glogau II el 5 de enero de 1310. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 31 de marzo de 1329, en Powiat górowski, dolnośląskie, Polonia, a la edad de 33 años, y fue sepultada en Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania.
